account.title: Your account
account.signedOutLead: Sign in to save preferences, follow diseases, and (for clinicians) contribute guideline updates.
account.lead: Your GeneGuidelines profile. This information comes from your account and is visible only to you.

join.notFoundDefaultMessage: This invitation could not be found.
join.invalidTitle: This invitation is no longer valid
join.expiredMessage: This invitation has expired. Ask the person who invited you to send a new link.
join.usedMessage: This invitation has already been used. If that wasn't you, ask for a fresh link.
join.signupClosedMessage: {{inviter}} invited you as a clinician. Sign-up isn't open in this environment yet — please check back soon.
join.welcomeMessage: Your clinician account is set up. Identity verification is pending; an administrator (or ORCID, where available) will confirm it shortly. You can start exploring guidelines now.
join.errorDefaultMessage: Something went wrong accepting this invitation.
join.inviteMessageSuffix: invited you to join as a clinician — to review and contribute to living clinical guidelines for rare genetic diseases.
join.verifyNote: Doctor accounts are verified before they can publish. You'll be set up as a clinician now; verification follows.
join.signInCta: Sign in or create your account
